channel.title: bothSidesHeadlinesNLmoneyAndMarkets
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from bothSidesHeadlinesNLmoneyAndMarkets, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump's meme coin down 80% since first event; another gala this weekend
item.description: $TRUMP digital token fails to rally despite private events for top holders.

item.title: NYC's new health commissioner on delivering affordability agenda
item.description: Rising costs for housing, healthcare and necessities take toll on well-being.

item.title: Investors worry about private credit's ties to software stocks, but money still flows
item.description: Billions continue to pour into ETFs with heavy software exposure despite concerns.

item.title: Cheap options suggest big post-earnings swing for tech titans next week
item.description: Wall Street may underestimate potential price explosion in tech earnings reports.

item.title: How to find out if your startup idea is any good
item.description: Action and speed celebrated, but reflection and strategy are equally important.

item.title: Americans turn to blue-collar jobs for stability; which offer most security?
item.description: Skilled trades gain interest amid college costs and tech layoffs.

item.title: How to choose a web design company that understands your customers
item.description: Optimize website for conversions by knowing who knows your customers best.

item.title: 10 frequently asked questions about domain names
item.description: Choosing a domain name is a critical decision for business owners.

item.title: How 2026 estate tax changes could impact your small business
item.description: Most Americans lack estate plans, creating significant liabilities for owners.

item.title: How I beat a poker champion at the World Series of Poker
item.description: Author recounts defeating legendary player 'The Grinder' Mizrachi.

item.title: DeepSeek won't sink U.S. AI titans
item.description: Panic fueling selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other giants is overblown.

item.title: Financial Services Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: Gain insight on Experian, SoFi Technologies and more.

item.title: Comex gold, silver settle lower
item.description: Gold down 1.4%, silver down 2.5% for the session.

item.title: Stocks sink in broad AI rout sparked by China's DeepSeek
item.description: Nasdaq leads declines as AI infrastructure makers suffer steep losses.

item.title: Arabica coffee prices hit record on US-Colombia tariff spat
item.description: Traders digest withdrawal of Trump's tariff and sanctions threats.
